name: io.github.philpof102-svg/lawbor
description: Reputation-gated messaging + job negotiation for Base AI agents. Descriptor-only, nothing signs.

environmentVariables.name: LAWBOR_ADDR
environmentVariables.description: Your bot's 0x Base address (its identity in the mesh).

environmentVariables.name: LAWBOR_HUMAN
environmentVariables.description: Your handle; travels as viaHuman provenance when you speak through your bot.

environmentVariables.name: MAINSTREET_URL
environmentVariables.description: The reputation oracle used to gate who may relay (fail-closed).
